programmes.show_description: Ghost Photobombs Kids. A mother's blood runs cold when a ghostly child photobombs a family picture in England. Plus, a social media influencer finds a monster under her bed. S6, Ep2
Haunted Doll Bites Child. A possessed doll torments a girl in Canada. Extra-terrestrial visitors stun a rugby team in Lebanon. In India, a headless apparition haunts three siblings. S6, Ep3

Teleshopping.
Daredevils. The Baggage Battlers travel to Toronto to bid on international freight and baggage. One of the experts finds an item manufactured by legendary daredevil, Evel Knievel. S2, Ep12
Liar Liar. The Baggage Battlers attend a well-kept secret sheriff's auction in Shreveport, LA. Billy scores a touchdown with his winnings, while a local sheriff interrogates Mark. S2, Ep13
Vancouver. The buyers bid on seized items and property at a police auction in Vancouver. Mark is interested in a magnetic drill while Billy and the Martins battle for vintage comics. S1, Ep9
NYC Transit. The buyers are at the New York City transit auction that contains 14,000 items. Billy and the Martins compete for a Stradivarius violin possibly worth $1 million. S1, Ep10
Toronto. The buyers bid against one another for lost airport items in Toronto. Mark and Billy bid for photography equipment and the Martins want a rare stamp collection. S1, Ep11
North Carolina. The buyers are in North Carolina to bid on lost, damaged and misplaced freight. They all compete for a box of war antiques, plus they bid on a cage of unknown items. S1, Ep12
Diamonds in the Rough. The Baggage Battlers are back. Today they visit an auction in Brooklyn, one of the busiest shipping ports in the USA, but will they unearth any treasures? S2, Ep2
Breaking the Bank. The Baggage Battlers head to Atlanta, Georgia, to a freight auction where Mark spies some Rolls Royce aircraft parts, but will his bid secure the items? S2, Ep2
Blast from the Past. The Baggage Battlers head to the Boston Estates Auction to gamble on historical items, but is a document announcing George Washington's death the real thing? S2, Ep3
Man on Fire. The Baggage Battlers head to Greensboro, which is a major hub for imported and exported goods. But will they unearth any valuable items in the lot at Quality Salvage? S2, Ep1
Chevy Surprise & Lucky Lamborghini. A proud son wants to surprise his dad with a 1960 Chevy pickup truck for his 65th birthday. And, Wayne buys a single-owner '67 Lamborghini 400 GT. S10, Ep3
100 Year Old Harley. Wayne finds a 100-year-old Harley Davidson in a basement and gambles on a pair of Ducatis at a Las Vegas auction. Plus, he meets top bike-builder, Arlen Ness. S10, Ep4
Coupe! (There It Is). Wayne pursues a '61 Cadillac Coupe DeVille. Plus, he sells a '71 Corvette Stingray and '70 C10 Chevy pickup at the Barrett-Jackson Northeast Auction. S10, Ep5
Ford GT40 & A Flying Banana. Wayne takes on a rare '34 MG PA Airline Coupe, helps out on a multi-million-dollar Ford GT40 Mk IV, and finds a unique Aston Martin Speed Model Type C. S10, Ep6
The Little Sister. A Canadian who bought the '62 Volkswagen Safari Bus wants a sister car for his daughter, upgrading a Volkswagen Bug for a similar look and smoother ride. S5, Ep3
A Caldera-What? An old build is back for new customisations and a new name. With Kevin out of town, Dave tries to sneak a personal project through the doors. S5, Ep4
The Hummer Of The Future. A client arrives and asks Dave to build what he thinks the Hummer H2 would look like 20 years into the future. It's out with the old and in with the new. S5, Ep5
Camaros, Impalas, Goodguys. Shorty takes on a 1969 Camaro that needs some love, a 1965 Impala that needs an air ride, and a 1940s pull wagon that could use some paint. S2, Ep1
The Chupacabra Firebird. Porkchop turns a 1969 Firebird convertible into a tribute Trans Am. The team transform the car with a new spoiler, custom interior, and racing stripes. S2, Ep2
Shipwreck Of Nazi Treasure. Jeremy Wade explores a shipwreck that could hold stolen Nazi treasure. Footage shows the moment a modern-day freight ship snaps in two in the Black Sea. S2, Ep1
Shipwreck Ghosts Of Mexico. Jeremy Wade explores the dark secrets of a 150-year-old shipwreck off the Mexican coast. Next, he uncovers a boiling river hidden deep in the Amazon. S2, Ep2
Wreck In The Shallows. Darrell heads to a shipwreck linked to Gordo's list. He leads his team to the shallows where the tough winds and waves have claimed centuries worth of ships. S2, Ep3
Treasure And Tragedy. After finding evidence of a 1700s-era lifeboat near shore, Darrell and the team discover the shipwreck it came from. But a sudden tragedy hits the expedition. S2, Ep4
Avalanche Ghost Train. At the site of America's deadliest avalanche, witnesses report bizarre apparitions and feelings of dread. Phil and Jess test a mind-bending scientific theory. S3, Ep8
Mexico's Haunted Cenotes. Phil and Jess investigate caverns believed to be portals to the Maya underworld. The sacred cenotes supposedly hide secrets far darker than any legend. S3, Ep9
Ring Of Fire UFOs. Phil and Jess probe the science behind geology's strangest phenomena while investigating mysterious objects flying around Mexico's tallest active volcano. S3, Ep10

Shock & Awe. The Baggage Battlers heads to the Louisiana Farm auction to bid on Americana collected for over 50 years. Mark misfires when he bids on the wrong item. S2, Ep14
Bad Blood. The Baggage Battlers are back. Today they visit an auction in Red Hook, N.Y., to try to take home a piece of history. Will they succeed? S3, Ep1
All in. Derek prepares to execute his plan of raiding Shawn's gold-rich spots. Plus, Vernon is stressed as the season closes in and his $200,000 investment could be lost. S5, Ep15
Jackpot. Derek experiences the wrath of Mr. Gold when he's caught mining on the Christine Rose's lucky spot. Plus, Emily has a panic attack on the Eroica. S5, Ep16
The Victoria Diggers' million-dollar dream is nearly at breaking point. Plus, the Dirt Dogs hunt down gold thieves and the Mahoneys stumble across a mysterious murder. S4, Ep5
The Ozark Howler. In Missouri, Forrest and Jessica examine reports of a wolf-like creature. A chance encounter with a local moonshiner leads them to an amazing discovery. S1, Ep4
Endless. Edgar Hansen is fed up with the 22 year marathon of pain, and finally confronts older brother Sig. Meanwhile, the Opilio Season ends with a harrowing mayday. S6, Ep16

programmes.show_name: Deadliest Catch: Inside the Catch: Best Brawls
programmes.show_description: Takes a closer look at the feuds and short fuses that make up the best Deadliest Catch conflicts. On a crab boat, sometimes the only way to earn respect is to fight for it.
Jaguars Gold. The treasure hunters make a new discovery, and a run-in with a jaguar leads to another revelation, but the new path has tragic consequences for Captain Keith. S2, Ep5
The Sultan's Heart. Josh Gates travels to Turkey and Hungary to find the missing heart of one of the greatest Ottoman rulers in Turkish history, Suleiman the Magnificent. S2, Ep9
Africa's Gold Hoard. Josh Gates travels to South Africa in search of former President Paul Kruger's missing gold cache. He evades dangerous poachers and meets the Shangaan tribe. S2, Ep11
Life Or Death In Michigan. The Dagues moved to Michigan's wilderness. But they have no power, predators killed their chickens and all their water must be hand-pumped from a well. S2, Ep11
Quake On The Forty. The Raneys return to Alaska, but they find their homestead on complete disrepair. They race to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in again. S2, Ep12
The Bushmen take over their new recruit's mine, but the new claim proves equally treacherous with little sign of opal. Bishop resorts to explosives to move a wall. S5, Ep16
The Bishop and Scotty struggle to make safe a wall and end up causing an avalanche. Meanwhile, the Mooka Boys' bobcat is hit with critical failure. S5, Ep17
The Widowmaker: Part 1. Intense weather and even more damage to his battered boat take a toll on Sig's heart. And the USCG attempts a dangerous medevac. S12, Ep17
Born With No Eyes. A young Brazilian boy was born without eyes, and the family hopes to have prosthetic eyes made. Two brothers in Nebraska suffer a rare bone loss condition. S5, Ep7
My Parasitic Twin. An Indian woman gives birth to a baby boy with the head and arms of his dead twin brother attached his chest. A Brazilian woman seeks treatment for her giant leg. S5, Ep8
The Poseidon Crew are forced to hunt Victoria's frozen high country. Meanwhile, the Gold Timers use the last of their savings to hire some big machinery. S7, Ep6
